slider.titulo-1:
Flavours from the countryside,
in your everyday kitchen…
slider.titulo-2:
For all types
of meals and cooking…
slider.titulo-3:
Meats, vegetables, pasta,
sauces and much more…

about.parrafo: Innovating in the flavoured salts segment since 2010, Sal de Campo brings you the aromas and flavours of traditional and popular customs for everyday meals, offering the best in quality certification and production processes to take our brand throughout the country.
about.historia-parrafo: In the early 1900s, families living in the countryside used the mixture of salt, herbs and spices that we put in our products. Today, those families are in towns and cities in the interior, but very few remain in rural areas. From Sal de Campo, we seek to transfer those uses and customs of the humid pampas, so you can live the same experiences in day-to-day life through the flavours of a simple plate of food, giving rise to our name and slogan.
about.slogan: Sal de Campo. Flavours from the countryside, in your everyday kitchen…

productos.parrafo: Each of our products has a special flavour. Discover your favourite…
productos.original-subtitulo: Medium Salt Mix with Herbs and Spices
productos.original-descripcion: Our family's original recipe, where it all began. The blend of medium salt, herbs and spices to use in all types of meals and cooking
productos.original-ingredientes: medium salt, ground black pepper, ground nutmeg, paprika, oregano, thyme, ground chili, provençal, rosemary and bay leaf.
productos.fina-subtitulo: Fine Salt Mix with Herbs and Spices
productos.fina-descripcion: The same Sal de Campo Original recipe, but made with fine salt, herbs and spices. Designed for everyday meals.
productos.fina-ingredientes: fine salt, ground black pepper, ground nutmeg, paprika, oregano, thyme, ground chili, provençal, rosemary and bay leaf.
productos.ahumada-subtitulo: Smoked Medium Salt Mix with Herbs and Spices
productos.ahumada-descripcion: With the usual blend of salt, herbs and spices and a touch of smoke to break the routine
productos.ahumada-ingredientes: smoked medium salt, ground black pepper, ground nutmeg, paprika, oregano, thyme, ground chili, provençal, rosemary and bay leaf.
productos.pimientas-subtitulo: Medium Salt Mix with Crushed Pepper Mix
productos.pimientas-descripcion: Designed for the typical Argentine ribeye steak but applies to whatever meals you want most
productos.pimientas-ingredientes: medium salt, crushed black pepper, crushed white pepper, crushed allspice, crushed pink pepper and crushed green pepper.
productos.suave-subtitulo: Reduced Sodium Fine Salt Mix (-50%), with Herbs and Spices
productos.suave-descripcion: For those people who want to take care of their salt intake, without losing the aromas and flavours of the countryside.
productos.suave-ingredientes: reduced sodium fine salt, ground black pepper, ground nutmeg, paprika, oregano, thyme, ground chili, provençal, rosemary and bay leaf.
productos.especial-subtitulo: Herbs and Spices Mix (Does not contain Salt)
productos.especial-descripcion: Pure spices, to use whenever you prefer
productos.especial-ingredientes: ground black pepper, ground nutmeg, paprika, oregano, thyme, ground chili, provençal, rosemary and bay leaf.
productos.marina-subtitulo: Fine Sea Salt With or Without Herbs and Spices
productos.marina-descripcion: Enhances the flavours of your meals, to use whenever you prefer
productos.marina-ingredientes: fine sea salt, ground black pepper, ground nutmeg, paprika, oregano, thyme, ground chili, provençal, rosemary and bay leaf.

recetas.parrafo: We share some suggestions and recipes. You can view them all together or search by product type.
recetas.marinaesp-sal: Sal de Campo Sea Salt with Spices

receta-aderezo.ingrediente-1: 1 or 2 level tablespoons of Sal de Campo Special
receta-aderezo.ingrediente-2: 1 jar of cream cheese or mayonnaise
receta-aderezo.paso-1: Add Sal de Campo Special to a jar of cream cheese or mayonnaise and mix well.
receta-aderezo.paso-2: Let it rest for 15 to 20 minutes so that the spices hydrate well and stir again.
receta-aderezo.paso-3: Exquisite flavoured dressing to prepare a delicious sandwich or as a dip to spread with breadsticks.

receta-arroz.ingrediente-8: Sal de Campo Fine to taste
receta-arroz.ingrediente-9: Sal de Campo Special to taste
receta-arroz.paso-1: Cut the carrots into small cubes. Set aside.
receta-arroz.paso-2: Boil the green beans for 5 minutes. Set aside.
receta-arroz.paso-3: Heat a pot with a thin layer of oil. Sauté the carrots and green beans for 5 minutes.
receta-arroz.paso-4: Add the rice and stir well. After 1 minute, add water to cover the rice, Sal de Campo Special and Sal de Campo Fine. Cook over medium heat, adding water if necessary.
receta-arroz.paso-5: Minutes before achieving the desired point for the rice, add the peas and corn. Cook until the rice, peas and corn are cooked.
receta-arroz.paso-6: Serve warm or let it cool completely before consuming.

receta-bife.ingrediente-2: Sal de Campo 5 Peppers as needed
receta-bife.paso-1: Remove the meat and bring to room temperature (it's important when grilling meat to let it rest for about 20 minutes before cooking).
receta-bife.paso-2: Heat the grill very well (it's not necessary to add oil as it cooks with the meat's own fat).
receta-bife.paso-3: Season the meat with Sal de Campo 5 Peppers.
receta-bife.paso-4: Place the meat on the very hot grill and cook the ribeye for a few minutes.
receta-bife.paso-5: When it changes color on the sides, flip and finish cooking until reaching the desired doneness.
receta-bife.paso-6: Once ready, let it rest for 3 to 5 minutes on the grill before serving.
receta-bife.paso-7: Serve with french fries and Enjoy.

receta-bifechorizo.ingrediente-2: Sal de Campo 5 Peppers as needed
receta-bifechorizo.paso-1: Season the steaks with Sal de Campo 5 Peppers.
receta-bifechorizo.paso-2: Brown in oil. Remove and set aside.
receta-bifechorizo.paso-3: In the same pot, place the vegetables cut into approximately 2 cm cubes.
receta-bifechorizo.paso-6: Place the meat over the browned vegetables.
receta-bifechorizo.paso-7: Add the wine, deglaze and let the alcohol evaporate.
receta-bifechorizo.paso-9: Cover, lower the heat, cook slowly for 45 minutes or until reduced.

receta-burger.ingrediente-3: 1 small onion diced into small cubes
receta-burger.ingrediente-4: Sal de Campo Original to taste
receta-burger.paso-1: In a pan, heat the oil. Once ready, add the chopped onion and Sal de Campo Original.
receta-burger.paso-2: Cook until the onion is soft and transparent.
receta-burger.paso-3: In a bowl, combine all ingredients (including the sauté) and mix by hand, kneading the meat lightly.
receta-burger.paso-4: Divide the mixture into 6 portions and shape them into burger patties of the diameter you prefer.
receta-burger.paso-6: Heat oil in the pan again and place the burgers.
receta-burger.paso-7: Cook over medium heat until golden brown on both sides and cooked through.
receta-burger.paso-8: You can also use Sal de Campo Smoked or Sal de Campo 5 Peppers for a more gourmet touch

receta-ensaladapasta.ingrediente-6: Sal de Campo Light to taste
receta-ensaladapasta.paso-2: When it boils, add the pasta and Sal de Campo Light.
receta-ensaladapasta.paso-3: Cook for the time indicated on the package. Remove al dente. Drain and let cool.
receta-ensaladapasta.paso-4: Boil and cut the egg into small pieces.
receta-ensaladapasta.paso-5: Cut the olives and cherry tomatoes to your liking.
receta-ensaladapasta.paso-6: Mix the pasta with the cherry tomatoes, arugula, olives and any other ingredient you want to add.
receta-ensaladapasta.paso-8: If you like, you can spread a little pesto on top which is delicious

receta-escabeche.paso-1: Debone the chicken and cut into approximately 2 mm cubes, sear and set aside.
receta-escabeche.paso-2: Cut the carrots and onions into not-so-thin julienne strips.
receta-escabeche.paso-3: In a pot, place the chicken, carrots, onions, bay leaf, and garlic.
receta-escabeche.paso-4: Season to taste with Sal de Campo Sea Salt and add oil, wine and vinegar.
receta-escabeche.paso-5: Cook over low heat covered until the carrots are tender.
receta-escabeche.paso-6: Let cool in the same liquid and serve as an appetizer.

receta-guiso.ingrediente-1: 1 or 2 beef, chicken or pork steaks
receta-guiso.ingrediente-11: Sal de Campo Sea Salt with Spices
receta-guiso.paso-1: In a pot, brown the meat with a little oil.
receta-guiso.paso-2: Once the meat is seared, remove it and (without washing) in the same pot sauté the onion and bell pepper.
receta-guiso.paso-3: Add the tomato, mix several times and pour in the tomato puree, potatoes, carrots and corn, letting it cook for 15/20 minutes. If necessary, add a little broth
receta-guiso.paso-4: Add the browned meat, wine, pumpkin and season to taste with Sal de Campo Sea Salt with Spices.
receta-guiso.paso-5: Cook over low heat for another 15/20 minutes.

receta-pastaburrata.titulo-receta: Spaghetti with Cherry Tomatoes, Basil and Burrata
receta-pastaburrata.ingrediente-8: Sal de Campo Smoked to taste
receta-pastaburrata.paso-2: In a pan add oil, sauté the garlic and add diced red bell pepper
receta-pastaburrata.paso-4: Cook the pasta until it's approximately 80% done.
receta-pastaburrata.paso-5: Using tongs, place the pasta in the pan with the tomatoes.
receta-pastaburrata.paso-6: Finish and toss the pasta to help form a sauce.
receta-pastaburrata.paso-7: Serve the pasta and add the Burrata cheese on top.
receta-pastaburrata.paso-8: Cut the burrata and drizzle with olive oil + Sal de Campo Smoked. This step is essential!

receta-ceviche.ingrediente-8: A handful of fresh cilantro leaves
receta-ceviche.ingrediente-9: Sal de Campo Smoked to taste
receta-ceviche.paso-1: Cut the salmon into dice, not too small, approximately 1.5 cm.
receta-ceviche.paso-2: Remove the skin from the cucumber with a vegetable peeler, remove the seeds and cut it into small dice.
receta-ceviche.paso-3: Wash the radishes and cut them into thin slices.
receta-ceviche.paso-4: Peel the onion and cut it into very thin strips.
receta-ceviche.paso-5: Remove the skin from the segments of one of the tangerines and crumble them with your fingers or cut them into small pieces with a knife.
receta-ceviche.paso-6: Squeeze 1 tangerine and 1 lime, put their juice in a bowl and add Sal de Campo Smoked to taste, the onion, cucumber, radishes and half of the tangerine.
receta-ceviche.paso-7: Optionally, if you like spicy, add a few drops of tabasco.
receta-ceviche.paso-8: Finally, add the salmon dice, stir until the ingredients are well mixed and transfer to a deep plate or bowl to serve.
receta-ceviche.paso-9: Place the rest of the tangerine on top and decorate with a few fresh cilantro leaves.
receta-ceviche.paso-10: Only 1 lime is used to prevent the smoked flavor of the salmon from being lost due to excess acidity.

receta-salmuera.ingrediente-1: 70 gr (6 level tablespoons) of Sal de Campo Original
receta-salmuera.paso-1: Mix Sal de Campo Original in 1 liter of warm water in a container and stir well.
receta-salmuera.paso-2: Let rest for 15 to 20 minutes so that the spices hydrate well and stir again
receta-salmuera.paso-3: If using a pitcher as a container, you can use a sprig of rosemary to brush over the food to be cooked.

receta-salsalocro.ingrediente-5: Sal de Campo Fine a pinch
receta-salsalocro.paso-1: Pour oil into a pan and bring to low heat.
receta-salsalocro.paso-2: When the oil is hot, add the chopped green onions and lower the heat to minimum.
receta-salsalocro.paso-3: Dissolve the ground chili and paprika in the oil, and stir with a wooden spoon.
receta-salsalocro.paso-5: Cook for five minutes and remove.
receta-salsalocro.paso-6: Add cold water and set aside.

receta-sopacalabaza.ingrediente-7: Sal de Campo Sea Salt to taste
receta-sopacalabaza.paso-2: Place the pumpkin in cubes and brown
receta-sopacalabaza.paso-4: Season with Sal de Campo Sea Salt
receta-sopacalabaza.paso-5: Let boil until the pumpkin dissolves
receta-sopacalabaza.paso-6: In a pan, brown the bacon. Chop half and reserve the rest
receta-sopacalabaza.paso-7: Add the cream to the soup and simmer for about 5 more minutes
receta-sopacalabaza.paso-8: Remove and serve with flavored croutons and chopped and sliced bacon

receta-vegetales.ingrediente-6: Sal de Campo Sea Salt with Spices to taste
receta-vegetales.paso-2: Except for the onions, leave the rest with their skin on.
receta-vegetales.paso-3: Cut them, being careful to leave the harder vegetables in smaller pieces so they all cook at the same time.
receta-vegetales.paso-4: Grab a pan, heat it on the stove, add a drizzle of oil and put in the vegetables.
receta-vegetales.paso-5: Gently shake the pan so they don't stick.
receta-vegetales.paso-6: When the vegetables are golden, remove from heat, deglaze with a drizzle of water and season with Sal de Campo Sea Salt.
receta-vegetales.paso-7: Transfer the vegetables to an oven dish (already preheated), moderate heat, until the vegetables are cooked but firm.

receta-vinagreta.ingrediente-1: 1 level tablespoon of Sal de Campo Original or Sal de Campo Fina
receta-vinagreta.paso-1: In a suitable container for seasoning, mix the portion of Sal de Campo with the balsamic or vinegar so that the spices hydrate and the salt dissolves.
receta-vinagreta.paso-2: Add the oil and shake well to emulsify the entire mixture.
receta-vinagreta.paso-3: Your Sal de Campo vinaigrette is now ready to season vegetables and salads

receta-wraps.ingrediente-4: ½ red or green bell pepper diced
receta-wraps.ingrediente-5: 1 cup of chopped black or green olives (pitted)
receta-wraps.ingrediente-6: 250 grams of goat cheese cut into cubes
receta-wraps.ingrediente-8: Mayonnaise, natural yogurt or cream cheese
receta-wraps.ingrediente-10: Sal de Campo Light to taste
receta-wraps.paso-1: In a bowl, mix the lettuce, tomatoes, cucumber, bell pepper, olives and goat cheese.
receta-wraps.paso-2: Season with olive oil and Sal de Campo Light to taste, set aside.
receta-wraps.paso-3: Lay out each tortilla and cover the surface with a layer of mayonnaise, natural yogurt or cream cheese
receta-wraps.paso-4: Add 3 tablespoons of the vegetable and cheese mixture
receta-wraps.paso-5: Add 1 to 2 tablespoons of mashed avocado, carefully roll up and wrap each wrap with aluminum foil.
receta-wraps.paso-7: Cut each wrap into 2 portions and serve with your favorite sauce or dip
